title: Connect Boards automations not functioning
excerpt: I have made this automation on a template board that we then use to create website projects. I already have a column in both boards for the link and the button I have set up is how I want to connect them. So wondering …

posts.author: JackHeadford (Jack Headford)
posts.cookedHtml: I have made this automation on a template board that we then use to create website projects. I already have a column in both boards for the link and the button I have set up is how I want to connect them. So wondering if there can be a version of this automation where I can choose both boards and outline the column I want to link them with?
